rows.brief: Build a team chat app where companies create workspaces, users join channels and DMs, send messages with attachments, and stay connected in real-time. Production product, not a demo.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Implement secure login and registration for users and organizations.

modules_detailed.title: Workspace management
modules_detailed.description: Allow companies to create and manage their workspaces efficiently.

modules_detailed.title: Channel messaging
modules_detailed.description: Enable users to join channels and send messages, including attachments.

modules_detailed.title: Direct messaging
modules_detailed.description: Implement private messaging between users with real-time updates.

modules_detailed.title: Real-time notifications
modules_detailed.description: Provide instant notifications for messages and channel activity.

modules_detailed.title: User roles & permissions
modules_detailed.description: Manage different access levels for users within workspaces and channels.

modules_detailed.title: Admin dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Allow administrators to monitor and manage user activities and settings.

rows.brief: Build a fast issue tracker for software teams. Users create issues, assign owners, move them through statuses on a board, and see updates live as teammates work. Long-term product, multiple companies use it.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Manage user sign-up, login, and permission levels across teams.

modules_detailed.title: Issue Management
modules_detailed.description: Create, edit, and assign issues to team members effectively.

modules_detailed.title: Kanban Board
modules_detailed.description: Visual representation of issues for efficient status management and tracking.

modules_detailed.title: Real-time Updates
modules_detailed.description: Stream live updates on issue changes and team member activities.

modules_detailed.title: Notifications System
modules_detailed.description: Alert users on issue updates and assignments through various channels.

modules_detailed.title: Analytics Dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Provide insights on issue resolution times and team performance metrics.

rows.brief: Build a payments platform for a specific industry (think: Stripe for law firms). Merchants onboard, accept cards, manage chargebacks, see settlements, and reconcile their books. Production, multi-year horizon.

modules_detailed.title: Merchant Onboarding
modules_detailed.description: Facilitate smooth onboarding for law firms to use the payment platform.

modules_detailed.title: Payment Processing
modules_detailed.description: Enable secure card processing for law firms and their clients.

modules_detailed.title: Chargeback Management
modules_detailed.description: Manage and automate chargeback responses for law firms.

modules_detailed.title: Settlement Reporting
modules_detailed.description: Provide detailed reports on transactions and settlements for law firms.

modules_detailed.title: Reconciliation Tools
modules_detailed.description: Provide tools for law firms to reconcile their financial books easily.

modules_detailed.title: Admin Dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Admin interface for managing users, transactions, and settings.

rows.brief: Build a CRM for B2B sales teams: contacts, accounts, deals in a pipeline, activity timeline, email integration, reports. Each company has 20-200 reps. Real product, paying customers expected.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure login and management for sales representatives and admins.

modules_detailed.title: Contact Management
modules_detailed.description: Manage and organize contacts, including details and relationship history.

modules_detailed.title: Account Management
modules_detailed.description: Track and manage accounts with comprehensive insights and interactions.

modules_detailed.title: Deals Pipeline
modules_detailed.description: Visualize, track, and manage deals through the sales pipeline stages.

modules_detailed.title: Activity Timeline
modules_detailed.description: Log and display all activities and interactions for better tracking.

modules_detailed.title: Email Integration
modules_detailed.description: Integrate with email platforms to streamline communication and record keeping.

modules_detailed.title: Reporting Dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Generate reports on performance metrics and sales activities.

rows.brief: Build an AI copilot inside a domain SaaS app (e.g. legal). Users chat with the assistant, it pulls from their documents, drafts responses, learns their style. Production-grade product with paying users.

modules_detailed.title: User Chat Interface
modules_detailed.description: Frontend interface for users to interact with the AI copilot.

modules_detailed.title: Document Integration
modules_detailed.description: System to pull and analyze user documents for context.

modules_detailed.title: AI Response Generation
modules_detailed.description: Backend logic to generate personalized responses based on user style.

modules_detailed.title: User Learning Module
modules_detailed.description: Algorithm to learn user preferences and improve response accuracy.

modules_detailed.title: Admin Dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Management interface for monitoring usage and performance metrics.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure user login and session management.

modules_detailed.title: Analytics & Reporting
modules_detailed.description: Tools for tracking user engagement and AI performance.

rows.brief: Build an observability platform: customers send logs/metrics/traces from their infrastructure, we ingest at scale, run queries, build dashboards, fire alerts. Multi-tenant, production, infra-grade reliability.

modules_detailed.title: Data Ingestion
modules_detailed.description: Capture and process logs, metrics, and traces from customer infrastructures.

modules_detailed.title: Query Engine
modules_detailed.description: Develop a scalable system for executing queries on ingested data.

modules_detailed.title: Dashboard Builder
modules_detailed.description: Allow users to create and customize dashboards for their observability needs.

modules_detailed.title: Alerting System
modules_detailed.description: Implement a mechanism for notifying users based on specified triggers.

modules_detailed.title: Multi-tenancy Support
modules_detailed.description: Ensure data isolation and security for multiple customer environments.

modules_detailed.title: User Management
modules_detailed.description: Create functionality for user sign-up, roles, and permissions management.

modules_detailed.title: Monitoring & Reliability
modules_detailed.description: Set up infrastructure monitoring and failover mechanisms for reliability.

rows.brief: Build an online marketplace where buyers find services and sellers list offers, messages and bookings happen on-platform, payments held in escrow until delivery, with reviews and dispute handling. Real production product.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure registration and login for buyers and sellers.

modules_detailed.title: Service listings
modules_detailed.description: Allows sellers to create and manage service offers on the platform.

modules_detailed.title: Messaging system
modules_detailed.description: In-platform communication between buyers and sellers for inquiries and coordination.

modules_detailed.title: Booking management
modules_detailed.description: Facilitates appointment scheduling and calendar integration for services offered.

modules_detailed.title: Payments & escrow
modules_detailed.description: Handles secure transactions, holding payments until service completion.

modules_detailed.title: Reviews & ratings
modules_detailed.description: Enables buyers to leave feedback and ratings for services received.

modules_detailed.title: Dispute resolution
modules_detailed.description: Processes complaints and mediates disputes between buyers and sellers.

rows.brief: Build a realtime multiplayer collaborative whiteboard. Multiple users see each other's cursors, edit shapes together with no flicker, comment, share via link. Production product, teams use it daily.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Manage user sign-up, login, and session handling securely.

modules_detailed.title: Realtime collaboration
modules_detailed.description: Implement live updates for multiple users interacting on the whiteboard.

modules_detailed.title: Drawing tools
modules_detailed.description: Provide tools for shapes, drawing, and editing on the whiteboard.

modules_detailed.title: Comments & feedback
modules_detailed.description: Enable users to leave comments and feedback on the whiteboard.

modules_detailed.title: Link sharing
modules_detailed.description: Allow users to share editable whiteboard links with others.

modules_detailed.title: User management
modules_detailed.description: Admin features for managing users and permissions within the app.

rows.brief: Build a financial dashboard for a fintech: customers see accounts, transactions, transfer money between accounts, set up scheduled payments, view statements. Production banking-grade product, regulated environment.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure login and registration for customer accounts.

modules_detailed.title: Account overview
modules_detailed.description: Display a summary of customer accounts and balances.

modules_detailed.title: Transaction history
modules_detailed.description: Show detailed transactions for each account over time.

modules_detailed.title: Money transfers
modules_detailed.description: Enable customers to transfer funds between their accounts securely.

modules_detailed.title: Scheduled payments
modules_detailed.description: Allow customers to set up and manage recurring payments.

modules_detailed.title: Statement generation
modules_detailed.description: Generate and display account statements for customer review.

modules_detailed.title: Compliance & reporting
modules_detailed.description: Ensure regulatory requirements are met and generate necessary reports.

rows.brief: Build an ERP for mid-size manufacturers: inventory, purchase orders, invoices, general ledger, customer/vendor records, basic HR, role-based access. Used by 50-500 employees per company. Production, long-term contract.

modules_detailed.title: Inventory Management
modules_detailed.description: Track and manage inventory levels, orders, and deliveries.

modules_detailed.title: Purchase Orders
modules_detailed.description: Manage creation, approval, and tracking of purchase orders.

modules_detailed.title: Invoices & Billing
modules_detailed.description: Handle invoicing, payments, and billing processes.

modules_detailed.title: General Ledger
modules_detailed.description: Recording and managing financial transactions and reporting.

modules_detailed.title: Customer/Vendor Records
modules_detailed.description: Store and manage detailed information for customers and vendors.

modules_detailed.title: Basic HR Module
modules_detailed.description: Manage employee records, payroll and leave management.

modules_detailed.title: Access Control
modules_detailed.description: Implement role-based access for secure user management.
